shots.prompt_intent: dawn over a rocky New England cape, a white lighthouse silhouette, gentle swell, archival film grade
shots.narration: In 1716, the first American lighthouse rose over Boston Harbor.

shots.prompt_intent: slow reveal of a rotating Fresnel lens glowing amber inside the lamp room, warm light
shots.narration: Its rotating Fresnel lens could throw a beam for twenty miles.

shots.prompt_intent: a lighthouse at dusk in light fog, the beam sweeping across a calm sea, contemplative
shots.narration: Today most stand automated, quiet keepers of a fading craft.
